scripts.postinstall: mv node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app "node_modules/electron/dist/WhisperFlow Studio.app" 2>/dev/null; printf 'WhisperFlow Studio.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron' > node_modules/electron/path.txt && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Set :CFBundleDisplayName WhisperFlow Studio" "node_modules/electron/dist/WhisperFlow Studio.app/Contents/Info.plist" && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Set :CFBundleName WhisperFlow Studio" "node_modules/electron/dist/WhisperFlow Studio.app/Contents/Info.plist" && node scripts/patch-icon.js
